title: alepidocline macrocephala
side_effects: Alepidocline macrocephala can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing respiratory issues, allergic reactions, and gastrointestinal problems in some individuals. Prolonged exposure to its extracts may lead to dizziness, nausea, and headaches. In severe cases, improper use of Alepidocline macrocephala can result in liver damage and an increased risk of bleeding disorders. Additionally, its misuse may also interact negatively with certain medications, exacerbating existing health conditions.
